# Support

## How to Get Help

- **Bug Reports**: [Open an issue](https://github.com/luisbarcia/n8n-nodes-brasil-hub/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) using the bug report template
- **Feature Requests**: [Open an issue](https://github.com/luisbarcia/n8n-nodes-brasil-hub/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) using the feature request template
- **Questions**: Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/luisbarcia/n8n-nodes-brasil-hub/discussions)

## External Resources

- [n8n Community Forum](https://community.n8n.io/) — General n8n questions
- [n8n Documentation](https://docs.n8n.io/) — Official n8n docs
- [BrasilAPI Documentation](https://brasilapi.com.br/docs) — API-related questions

## Before Asking for Help

1. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/luisbarcia/n8n-nodes-brasil-hub/issues) and discussions
2. Check the README for documentation
3. Ensure you are using the latest version of the package
4. Try reproducing the issue with a minimal workflow
